name: Layered Pear Cream Cheese Mold
recipeIngredient: 1 package (8 servings or 2 packages of 4 servings) Lime Flavored Jello
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain pears, reserving liquid. Dice pears; set aside.
2. Add water to the reserved liquid to make 1 1/2 cups; bring to boil in a small saucepan.
3. Stir boiling liquid into gelatin in a large bowl and let stand at least 2 minutes until completely dissolved.
4. Stir in cold ginger ale and lemon juice. Reserve 2 1/2 cups of the gelatin mixture at room temperature.
5. Pour the remaining gelatin mixture into a 5-cup mold.
6. Refrigerate about 30 minutes, or until thickened (a spoon leaves definite impression).
7. Arrange about 1/2 cup of the diced pears in the thickened gelatin layer in the mold.
8. Stir reserved 2 1/2 cups of gelatin into cream cheese in a large bowl with a wire whisk until smooth.
9. Refrigerate about 30 minutes, or until slightly thickened (consistency of beaten egg whites).
10. Stir in remaining diced pears and pecans. Spoon over the gelatin layer in the mold.
11. Refrigerate 4 hours, or until firm. Unmold. Garnish as desired. Makes 10 servings.
